creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204397
maxima - portrevision bump

Apparently when sbcl is updated maxima needs a PORTREVISION bump.
Here is the patch for this time. I will follow sbcl updates and try to bump PORTREVISION as soon as possible, but if for some reason I am late and you need to report again, please open a new PR so we do not have to reopen the same PR multiple times.

Thank you.
